case_title: CARLSON, CHRISTIE VS DAVIS, DANIELLE DBA KITCHEN AND BATHS BY DANIELLE

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CARLSON, CHRISTIE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, DANIELLE DBA KITCHEN AND BATHS BY DANIELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLSON, CHRISTIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAVIS, DANIELLE DBA KITCHEN AND BATHS BY DANIELLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DANIELLE DAVIS OWNER & INDIV. KITCHEN & BATHS BY DANIELLE RETURNED SIGNED;
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DATE REQUESTED:11/13/98 AT 10:00 A.M. $10.00 COURT FEE PAID BY CASH.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-1998, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-13-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF ( RE: CONTINUANCE REQUEST OF DEFENDANT) FILED; DEF'S REQ. HAS BEEN GRANTED AS OF 10-07-98;
